payload.answer: SQL debug/admin execution is disabled in this environment, so the query was not run. No memory was created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL debug request, not a user memory assertion. SQL execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

details: Rejected admin SQL request because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.
No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED only in an authorized debug environment before running admin SQL.
Use a supported non-SQL memory inspection command if available.
